name: Grilled Chicken & Quinoa Avocado Bowl
instructions: Season and grill chicken breast until internal temp reaches 165°F.
Slice chicken and serve over cooked quinoa and spinach.
Top with sliced avocado, olive oil, and a squeeze of lemon.

name: Greek Yogurt Protein Parfait
instructions: Layer Greek yogurt, berries, and granola in a bowl or jar.
Drizzle with honey before serving.

name: Turkey & Sweet Potato Skillet
instructions: Brown ground turkey in a skillet over medium heat.
Add diced sweet potato, bell pepper, and onion; cook covered until tender, about 15 minutes.
Season with smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.

name: Baked Salmon with Asparagus
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Toss asparagus in olive oil and garlic, arrange on a sheet pan with salmon.
Bake 15-18 minutes until salmon flakes easily. Finish with fresh lemon juice.

name: Egg White Veggie Scramble
instructions: Sauté mushrooms, spinach, and tomatoes in a nonstick pan until softened.
Add egg whites and scramble until fully cooked.
Top with crumbled feta.

name: Protein Power Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Blend protein powder, banana, and almond milk until smooth.
Pour into a bowl and top with chia seeds and granola.

name: Lean Beef & Broccoli Stir Fry
instructions: Sear sliced flank steak in a hot pan or wok until browned.
Add broccoli, garlic, and ginger; stir-fry 4-5 minutes.
Stir in tamari and sesame oil, serve over brown rice.

name: Cottage Cheese & Pineapple Bowl
instructions: Combine cottage cheese and pineapple in a bowl.
Top with sliced almonds and a drizzle of honey.

name: Shrimp & Zucchini Noodles
instructions: Sauté shrimp and garlic in olive oil until shrimp turns pink.
Add zucchini noodles and cherry tomatoes, toss 2-3 minutes.
Finish with grated parmesan.

name: Chicken Breast & Black Bean Bowl
instructions: Grill or pan-sear chicken breast, then slice.
Combine black beans and corn in a bowl, top with chicken.
Finish with lime juice and chopped cilantro.

name: Zucchini Lasagna
instructions: Layer sliced zucchini, browned ground beef, marinara, ricotta, and mozzarella in a baking dish.
Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes until bubbly and golden.

name: Cauliflower Fried Rice with Chicken
instructions: Sauté diced chicken until cooked through, push to one side of the pan.
Scramble egg on the other side, then mix in cauliflower rice and vegetables.
Stir in tamari and sesame oil.

name: Bunless Turkey Burger with Side Salad
instructions: Form ground turkey into a patty and grill or pan-sear until cooked through.
Wrap in romaine leaves with tomato and avocado.
Serve with a side of mixed greens and vinaigrette.

name: Baked Cod with Garlic Butter & Green Beans
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Place cod and green beans on a sheet pan.
Melt butter with garlic and drizzle over cod and beans.
Bake 15-18 minutes, finish with fresh lemon juice.

name: Keto Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Toss chopped romaine with Caesar dressing.
Top with sliced grilled chicken and shaved parmesan.

name: Steak & Roasted Brussels Sprouts
instructions: Toss Brussels sprouts in olive oil and garlic, roast at 425°F for 20 minutes.
Season and pan-sear steak to desired doneness.
Rest steak 5 minutes before slicing and serving.

name: Egg & Avocado Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Scramble or fry eggs to preference.
Serve over a bed of spinach with sliced avocado and salsa.

name: Pork Tenderloin with Sauteed Spinach
instructions: Season pork tenderloin and roast at 400°F for 20-25 minutes until 145°F internal.
Sauté spinach and garlic in olive oil until wilted.
Slice pork and serve over spinach.

name: Grilled Chicken with Brown Rice & Broccoli
instructions: Grill chicken breast until cooked through.
Steam broccoli until tender-crisp.
Serve chicken over brown rice with broccoli, drizzled with olive oil.

name: Turkey Chili with Kidney Beans
instructions: Brown ground turkey with onion and bell pepper.
Add beans, diced tomatoes, and chili powder.
Simmer 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.

name: Baked Tilapia with Quinoa & Asparagus
instructions: Bake tilapia at 400°F for 12-15 minutes with lemon.
Roast asparagus with olive oil alongside.
Serve over cooked quinoa.

name: Whole Wheat Pasta with Turkey Meatballs
instructions: Form turkey into meatballs and bake at 400°F for 18-20 minutes.
Toss cooked pasta with marinara and meatballs.
Top with grated parmesan.

name: Chicken Fajita Bowl
instructions: Sauté sliced chicken, bell pepper, and onion with fajita seasoning.
Serve over brown rice topped with salsa.

name: Salmon Teriyaki with Rice & Snap Peas
instructions: Bake or pan-sear salmon, brushing with teriyaki sauce.
Steam snap peas until tender-crisp.
Serve salmon over jasmine rice with snap peas.

name: Beef & Vegetable Stir Fry with Rice
instructions: Sear flank steak in a hot wok, remove and set aside.
Stir-fry mixed vegetables until tender-crisp.
Return steak to the pan, toss with tamari, and serve over brown rice.

name: Caprese Quinoa Salad
instructions: Combine cooked quinoa, mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil in a bowl.
Drizzle with balsamic glaze before serving.

name: Veggie Omelet with Whole Grain Toast
instructions: Whisk eggs and pour into a heated nonstick pan.
Add bell pepper, onion, and cheddar; fold omelet once set.
Serve with a slice of toasted whole grain bread.

name: Black Bean & Sweet Potato Tacos
instructions: Roast diced sweet potato at 425°F for 20 minutes.
Warm black beans and tortillas.
Assemble tacos with sweet potato, black beans, avocado, and lime juice.

name: Margherita Flatbread
instructions: Top flatbread with mozzarella and tomato slices.
Bake at 425°F for 10-12 minutes until cheese melts.
Finish with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil.

name: Lentil & Vegetable Curry with Rice
instructions: Simmer lentils, coconut milk, and curry powder together.
Add mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 15 minutes.
Serve over jasmine rice.

name: Spinach & Feta Stuffed Portobello
instructions: Sauté spinach and garlic in olive oil until wilted.
Stuff mushroom caps with spinach mixture and top with feta.
Bake at 400°F for 15-18 minutes.

name: Broccoli Cheddar Baked Potato
instructions: Bake potato at 400°F for 45-50 minutes until tender.
Split potato and top with steamed broccoli, cheddar, and Greek yogurt.

name: Chickpea & Vegetable Buddha Bowl
instructions: Roast chickpeas at 400°F for 20 minutes until crisp.
Assemble quinoa, kale, chickpeas, and avocado in a bowl.
Drizzle with tahini dressing.

name: Vegan Lentil Bolognese with Zucchini Noodles
instructions: Simmer cooked lentils with marinara sauce for 10 minutes.
Lightly sauté zucchini noodles until just tender.
Top noodles with lentil bolognese and nutritional yeast.

name: Tofu Stir Fry with Brown Rice
instructions: Pan-sear cubed tofu until golden on all sides.
Add vegetables and ginger, stir-fry until tender-crisp.
Toss with tamari and serve over brown rice.

name: Black Bean & Quinoa Stuffed Peppers
instructions: Mix black beans, quinoa, corn, and salsa in a bowl.
Stuff bell pepper halves with the mixture.
Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.

name: Overnight Chia Pudding with Berries
instructions: Whisk chia seeds, almond milk, and maple syrup together.
Refrigerate overnight until thickened.
Top with mixed berries before serving.

name: Vegan Protein Power Bowl
instructions: Steam edamame and let cool slightly.
Combine quinoa, kale, edamame, and avocado in a bowl.
Top with hemp seeds and lemon tahini dressing.

name: Gluten-Free Turkey Meatballs with Zucchini Noodles
instructions: Mix ground turkey, gluten-free breadcrumbs, and egg; form into meatballs.
Bake at 400°F for 18-20 minutes.
Serve over zucchini noodles with marinara sauce.

name: Grilled Shrimp Skewers with Cauliflower Rice
instructions: Marinate shrimp in olive oil, garlic, and lemon; skewer and grill 2-3 minutes per side.
Sauté cauliflower rice until tender.
Serve shrimp skewers over cauliflower rice.
